title: Muffin's Pack
description: A pack made for me and my partner, going for a vanilla++ vibe, with slightly more than just vanilla feeling mods
body:
A modpack made for generating the feeling you felt when you first started playing minecraft, adding onto the game with a lot of vanilla plus plus type mods, so adding a fair amount of new stuff, while also trying to stay true to the original feeling of the game.
I've added a fair amount of performance mods to make it run butter smooth and I incentivise exploration by adding multiple new biomes via [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Blooming Biosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blooming-biosphere), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) among others all put together with [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender).

The pack is still subject to change as I plan on adding things like backpacks and bedrolls to inspire people to keep exploring. People should be rewarded for their exploration by being able to find new structures with good loot.

There's a lot of new structures added through various mods and a lot of new blocks for customisation and building.

This is alongside a fair amount of mods that improve performance and adds quality of life changes.

If your mod isn't on the description page, please contact me so I can add it here if you want a specific shoutout.

**This modpack has been fully rebuilt from the ground up for 1.21.11, but the purpose remains the same.**

(Mods included are subject to change as I'm still trying to find more mods to add onto the experience c:)
